description: The destabilized gravity device threatens to destroy the compound and everyone in it. Fitz and Simmons scramble for a scientific solution, advising Coulson to find a catalyst to neutralize the reaction. Dr. Hall, resigned to his fate, claims his actions will save millions even at the cost of innocent lives. Coulson makes a heart-wrenching choice to stop Hall and save the team, solidifying his role as leader with a hard call.

transcript.line: I see the future, Mr. Coulson, and it's a catastrophe.
I just see a lot of people in trouble. Nothing. Fitz-Simmons? I tried to cut the power. It's still going.
You need to find a catalyst.
Find some sort of catalyst. Something to create a chemical reaction in the core.
It's not too late to do the right thing. Help me find a catalyst...
I am doing the right thing... a completely selfless act. I know that history never celebrates what didn't happen. They'll call this a-a tragedy. They won't understand the good I did here.
Saving millions. We have to live with the choices we make, but sometimes we have to die with them, too.
I understand. You made a hard call.
And now I have to make mine.
